channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: NY Times/Siena Poll: Trump Still Leads GOP; One-Third Seek Change
item.description: President Donald Trump remains dominant in the Republican Party, according to a New York Times/Siena poll, though some GOP voters want a shift.

item.title: Being Alive Was Apparently Optional Under Biden's Student Loan Program
WATCH: Dem senator snaps after Acting AG Blanche accuses him of 'obviously lying' in heated exchange
item.description: Acting AG Blanche and Senator Van Hollen argue over whether a pardoned Jan. 6 rioter promised child abuse victims money from a DOJ restitution fund.

item.title: Rep. Buddy Carter to Newsmax: I'm the Ga. Senate Candidate Without 'Baggage'
item.description: Rep. Buddy Carter, R-Ga., told Newsmax he believes his U.S. Senate candidacy is the strongest among three Republicans in the Georgia race.
